name: Chocolate Layered Dessert
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Prepared Marble Pound Cake, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour milk into a large bowl.
2. Add pudding and beat with a wire whisk for 2 minutes.
3. Let stand for 5 minutes.
4. Gently stir in 2 cups of Cool Whip.
5. Arrange half of the cake cubes in a 3-1/2 quart serving bowl.
6. Drizzle with half of the chocolate syrup.
7. Add half of the chopped candy bars, then half of the pudding mixture.
8. Repeat layers ending with the pudding layer.
9. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour or until ready to serve.
10. Garnish with remaining whipped topping.
11. Sprinkle with additional chopped candy if desired.
12. Store any leftovers in the refrigerator.
